name: Lim Tae-Gyu
title: Guild Master of the Fiend Guild

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

basic.name: Dark Shot
basic.description: Tae-Gyu fires an arrow imbued with the power of darkness. Deals Dark elemental damage. Deals weak Break damage.

core.name: Volley Fire
core.description: Tae-Gyu fires multiple arrows simultaneously. Deals Dark elemental damage. Deals weak Break damage.

skill.name: Shoot and Maneuver
skill.description: Tae-Gyu slides to the side and fires. Deals Dark elemental damage. Deals weak Break damage. Usable 2 times. Activates Core Attack.

skill.name: Typhoon Fire
skill.description: Tae-Gyu gathers powerful energy into an arrow and strikes. Deals Dark elemental damage. Deals heavy Break damage.

support.name: Heavy Attack: Typhoon Fire
support.description: Tae-Gyu gathers powerful energy into an arrow and strikes. Deals Dark elemental damage. Deals medium Break damage. Applies Magic Boost effect: increases Core Attack damage by 50% for 15 seconds.

qte.name: Airborne Burst
qte.description: Tae-Gyu jumps into the air and shoots explosive arrows. Deals Dark elemental damage. Deals weak Break damage. Usage Conditions: Extreme Evasion, Core Attack, Ultimate Skill, Stun, or Blind.

ultimate.name: Quick Attack: Typhoon Fire
ultimate.description: Tae-Gyu spins once, adjusts his stance, and gets into Sniper Mode. Deals Dark elemental damage. Sniper Mode: Changes Basic Attack to Quick Attack: Typhoon Fire dealing 1640–2460% ATK damage, fires up to 8 projectiles, medium Break damage, lasts 10 seconds.

passive.name: Magic Boost
passive.description: When Airborne Burst is used, applies Magic Boost effect. When skill hits, fires 3 Magic Arrows. When Basic Attack hits, fires 2 Magic Arrows. Magic Arrow damage equals 1050% of Attack per arrow. Increases Core Attack, Typhoon Fire, Quick Fire: Typhoon Fire damage by 30%. Duration: 15 seconds.

advancements: Shoot and Maneuver enhanced: 25% speed and damage increase, usable 3 times. Volley Fire or Quick Attack: Typhoon Fire increases all team members' Critical Hit Rate by 0.7% and Critical Hit Damage by 1% for 10 seconds (stacks up to 8 times).

When Magic Boost active, increases Core Attack, Typhoon Fire, Quick Attack: Typhoon Fire effects by 80%. Shoot and Maneuver grants Magic Boost (15 sec cooldown). Typhoon Fire hit increases target's Critical Hit damage received by 7% for 12 seconds.
Entering stage regains 100% Power Gauge. Attack increases 4% per Volley Fire hit (stacks to 30 times, infinite duration).
